Crime, Drama, History
Creators, special guests and stars — including Cillian Murphy — unpack the "Peaky Blinders" saga in this official companion podcast for the new film.

With rare access and no holds barred, the acclaimed documentarian investigates a growing ultra-masculine network and its controversial influencers.

Action, Science Fiction, Thriller
An Army Ranger candidate and his team encounter an otherworldly killing machine in this action movie starring Alan Ritchson ("Reacher") and Dennis Quaid.

Drama
Grieving and facing the consequences of their crimes, the Traoré brothers get one last chance to forge a new path in the final chapter of this trilogy.

name: Strangers in the Park

Comedy, Drama
A former communist militant and a "live and let live" man form an unlikely friendship on a park bench, sharing their life stories with humor and heart.

name: Famous Last Words: Eric Dane
description:
Documentary, Talk Show
In this emotional interview, the late actor and ALS advocate Eric Dane shared his final message for the world — knowing it would not air until his death.

name: Firebreak

Drama, Thriller
An eight-year-old girl goes missing during a fire on a mountainside. But is the danger in the approaching blaze — or in the mysterious house next door?

name: Pavane
description:
Drama, Romance
Three lonely strangers meet at their department store jobs and find solace in each other's company while they explore connection and the nature of love.

name: The Swedish Connection

In this little-known true story, a Swedish bureaucrat becomes an unlikely war hero as he attempts to save Jewish lives during the darkest days of WWII.

An unprecedented look inside the lives of 3 young NASCAR drivers as they've established their identities both on and off the track this past season.

Comedy
Comedy icon Katt Williams delivers his famously bold takes on conspiracies, celebrities and the world at large in this electrifying stand-up special.

Documentary
This eye-opening documentary follows six couples with unexplained infertility as they lower their exposure to plastics in hopes it helps them conceive.

description: Crime, Thriller

description: Action, Thriller

name: Mercy

Action, Crime
In the near future, a detective accused of murdering his wife has 90 minutes to prove his innocence to the advanced A.I. Judge he once championed before it determines his fate.

name: Ghost Elephants
description:
Documentary
Explorers search for the largest, most elusive land mammals alive today.

name: Faking Beethoven
description: Beethoven, the world's most famous musician and iconic solitary genius. But what if that image was entirely fabricated… by his own secretary?

name: Son Bayram
description: Comedy

name: Agent Zeta
description: Thriller

description: Comedy

name: Subedaar
description:
Action, Drama
Haunted by loss and drifting away from his daughter, a retired Subedaar Arjun Maurya's newly found civilian life is jolted by one reckless act. As old wounds reopen, he must summon the warrior within to face a new kind of war - one that hits too close to his heart.

name: Fabian and the Deadly Wedding
description:
Comedy, Crime, Mystery
Hapless con artist Fabian crashes a quirky winter wedding, planning to steal a valuable gift meant for the bride. But when a murder disrupts his scheme, Fabian finds himself unexpectedly drawn into solving the mystery. A thrilling murder mystery comedy packed with dark secrets.

name: Cheekatilo
description:
Crime, Thriller
Cheekatilo is a gripping thriller that exposes the buried horrors of patriarchy, power and truth. When crime anchor Sandhya's best friend is found dead under suspicious circumstances, she embarks on a dangerous investigation that collides with a dark past. As secrets unravel, Sandhya must face her trauma and rise as a fearless voice for the silenced.

name: Finding Harmony: A King's Vision
description:
Documentary
In an unprecedented portrait of King Charles III, Finding Harmony: A King's Vision provides intimate insight into His Majesty's passionate quest to reunite humanity with nature. Academy Award-winner Kate Winslet narrates this journey through The King's Foundation's vital work.

name: The Bluff
description:
Action, Adventure
When her tranquil life on a remote island is shattered by the return of her vengeful former captain, a skilled ex-pirate must confront her bloody past and unleash her deadly talents to save her family from a ruthless siege.

name: Lee Soo Man: King of K-Pop
description:
Documentary, Music
From the traditional town of Jeonju, South Korea came the man that changed the world with music. Lee Soo-Man, the artist who became an innovator, orchestrated one of the most viral global phenomena, K-Pop.

name: Nikki Glaser: Good Girl
description: Comedy

name: Hannah Montana 20th Anniversary Special
description: Documentary, Music

name: Paranormal Cuma
description:
Comedy
Paranormal Cuma tells the story of a man whose clumsiness lands him in unexpected situations. He works as a mechanic at a university hospital. One day, his clumsiness wreaks havoc on the hospital's electrical system, and he wreaks havoc on the hospital while trying to make up for his mistake.

name: Fit for Life - Dare to Dream
description:
Documentary
At 82, Jack Lowe takes on 11 legendary Tour de France climbs in 7 days, ending at Alpe d'Huez. With him is Jiggs Barasara, 50, facing his first Alpine challenge. The film tells a story of resilience and friendship, showing how passion and mindset can make old age adventurous and full of life.

name: Relationship Goals
description:
Comedy, Romance
When TV producer Leah Caldwell aims to become the first woman running New York's top morning show, her ex Jarrett Roy competes for the same role. He claims to be changed by the book 'Relationship Goals,' which becomes a theme as her friends explore the book's wisdom too. Leah stays focused on her career-until chemistry with her ex challenges her priorities.

name: Love Me Love Me
description:
Drama, Romance
After her brother's death, June moves to Milan for a fresh start, finding comfort in Will, the perfect honor student at her new international school. But when his troubled best friend James-hiding a dangerous life in clandestine MMA fights-sparks a rivalry that quickly turns into irresistible attraction, June must choose between safety and a love that upends everything she thought she wanted.

name: Melania
description:
Documentary
MELANIA offers unprecedented access to the 20 days before the 2025 Presidential Inauguration-through the First Lady's eyes. Step inside Melania Trump's world as she orchestrates inauguration plans, navigates the White House transition, and moves her family back to Washington. Featuring exclusive footage of critical meetings, private conversations, and never-before-seen environments.

name: The Wrecking Crew
description:
Action, Comedy, Crime
In THE WRECKING CREW, estranged half-brothers Jonny (Jason Momoa) and James (Dave Bautista) reunite after their father's mysterious death. As they search for the truth, buried secrets reveal a conspiracy threatening to tear their family apart. Set in Hawaii, the film is directed by Ángel Manuel Soto and stars Claes Bang, Jacob Batalon, Stephen Root, and Morena Baccarin.

name: Primate
description:
Horror
Lucy's tropical island homecoming turns deadly when her family's clever chimp spirals into a savage rabid frenzy. With her father away and no help coming, paradise becomes a prison as she and her friends fight to survive a predator they once trusted.

name: Descendants/ZOMBIES Worlds Collide - Concert Special
description:
Music
An unprecedented concert spectacular that brings the casts of ZOMBIES and Descendants together.

name: The Muppet Show
description:
Comedy, Family, Music
"The Muppet Show" is back in the original Muppet Theatre with special guest star Sabrina Carpenter!

name: Pizza Movie
description: Comedy

name: Disneyland Handcrafted
description: Documentary

name: Mike & Nick & Nick & Alice
description: Action, Comedy, Crime

name: Cheetahs Up Close with Bertie Gregory
description:
Documentary
Bertie’s mission takes him to Tanzania to film cheetahs on the hunt.

name: In the Blink of an Eye
description:
Drama, Science Fiction
Three storylines of the circle of life intersect across centuries.

name: Kevin Costner Presents: The First Christmas
description:
Documentary, Drama
Exploring the extraordinary journey of Mary and Joseph.

name: 2025 Rock & Roll Hall of Fame Induction Ceremony
description:
Music
Inductees Bad Company, Cyndi Lauper, Salt-N-Pepa and Soundgarden perform, plus special guests!

name: Versa
description: Animation, Drama

name: Sebastian Maniscalco: It Ain't Right
description:
Comedy, Documentary
Sebastian Maniscalco goes all in on family chaos, aging, and the things that drive us all nuts.

name: LEGO Frozen: Operation Puffins
description:
Adventure, Animation
A vengeful villain and his menacing puffins attempt to take over Anna and Elsa’s beloved castle.

name: Bruce Springsteen: Nebraska Live
description:
Music
An intimate performance from Bruce Springsteen for his remarkable 1982 album, Nebraska.

name: Taylor Swift | The Eras Tour | The Final Show
description:
Documentary, Music
“Taylor Swift | The Eras Tour | The Final Show” is the full concert film filmed in Vancouver, B.C.

name: The Fires
description: Thriller

name: Chris Hemsworth: A Road Trip to Remember
description:
Documentary
Chris goes on a road trip with his dad to rekindle forgotten memories.

name: Megastructures: Real Madrid Super Stadium
description:
Documentary
The remodeling of Real Madrid's stadium defies the limits of engineering.

name: Prep & Landing: The Snowball Protocol
description:
Adventure, Animation
Elves Lanny and Wayne relive their Christmas fails!

name: Robot Chicken: Self-Discovery Special
description:
Comedy
Our hapless Robot Chicken Nerd seeks self-discovery America's way: Going on reality shows! Will he find a 90 Day Fiancé -- or end up Shark Week chum?

name: Chris Fleming: Live at The Palace
description:
Comedy
From the Cadillac Palace Theatre in Chicago, comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special.

name: 33 Photos from the Ghetto
description:
Documentary
Directed by Jan Czarlewski, this documentary tells the story of the only known photographs from inside the Warsaw Ghetto during the April 1943 uprising that were not taken by German forces. The images, taken secretly by 23-year-old Polish firefighter Zbigniew Leszek Grzywaczewski, present a rare civilian account of one of World War II's darkest moments. The film traces two families who preserved the images for 80 years but hadn't brought them to light – until the son of the photographer found the forgotten negatives and launched an investigation. Following a team of researchers, archivists, and animators who use near-forensic precision to reconstruct locations and contexts, 33 Photos from the Ghetto examines the circumstances of those tragic days and the lives captured in each frame.

name: Stolen Children
description:
Documentary
This deeply affecting documentary exposes a long-time trafficking scheme that separated tens of thousands of newborns from their families.

name: Critical Incident: Death at the Border
description:
Documentary
CRITICAL INCIDENT revisits the 2010 death of Anastasio Hernández-Rojas, an undocumented Mexican immigrant who died while in custody at the border.

name: Serial Killer Serial Liar Levi Bellfield: A Faking It Special
description:
Documentary
A serial killer lies about his horrific murders and his lies continue from behind bars. Our experts reveal the truth.

name: True Beauty: The Movie - Part 1
description: Insecure student Reina hides her true face behind makeup and becomes popular. But her secret face haunts her. Caught between Shun, the icy genius, and Yu, the rich dreamer, she gets involved in a love triangle where one reveal could destroy everything.

name: Music Box: Happy and You Know It
description:
Documentary, Family, Music
Director Penny Lane explores the playful and surprising world of children's music – and how the genre connects us to the kid inside us all.

name: The Shuffle
description:
Documentary
This short film reveals the story behind the 1985 Chicago Bears' iconic rap music video, "The Super Bowl Shuffle."

name: Thoughts & Prayers
description:
Documentary
​Directed by Zackary Canepari and Jessica Dimmock, this arresting yet sobering documentary captures the current landscape of gun safety rituals in schools and communities across America, where mass shootings have become a part of everyday life. Through candid and revealing interviews with teachers, administrators, students, and parents, the film speaks to a new "normal" in which classrooms double as tactical training grounds, bullet-proof backpacks become armor, and conferences showcase the latest survival gadgets. Equal parts absurd and unsettlingly real, Thoughts & Prayers traces the $3 billion active shooter preparedness industry and raises important questions about the unintended consequences of these intense preparations on students and educators as communities take the situation into their own hands. In the absence of meaningful prevention efforts and gun reform, how far will Americans go to prepare for active shooters?

name: Country Doctor
description:
Documentary
Since 2010, over 140 hospitals in rural America have closed, leaving just one doctor for every 2,500 people. Filmed over three years in intimate cinéma vérité style, this short film follows Dr. James Graham in Fairfax, Oklahoma (population 1,263), who has spent over 40 years dispatching medicine, comfort, and wisdom to his patients. With a severe lack of medical facilities in rural communities, Dr. Graham divides his time between Fairfax Hospital, a nursing home, and three clinics – one of which is 60 miles away and serves four counties – in his fight to provide adequate healthcare for his community. As rural hospitals continue to face severe staffing shortages and risk closure, Country Doctor positions Dr. Graham's story as a powerful lens through which to understand both the fragility and the fierce resilience of rural healthcare.

name: Sarah Squirm: Live + in the Flesh
description:
Comedy
Sarah Sherman's unholy alter ego, Sarah Squirm, slithers onto your screen in her first HBO stand-up special. After four seasons (and counting) on Saturday Night Live, the comedian rips off the straitjacket, unleashing a festering and hilarious hour of bodily fluids, open-wound confessionals, and jokes that will leave scars on your soul.

name: The Secrets We Bury
description:
Documentary, Mystery
Follow the eccentric Mike Carroll in this chilling family mystery as he sets out to find his long-lost father. What he uncovers along the way threatens to shake the very foundation of his family.

name: Pearl Harbour: Minute by Minute
description:
Documentary
Experience the tragedy of the Titanic as it happened, following every crucial decision, event, and human story in the fateful hours leading to its sinking.

name: An Intimate Evening with Adam Pally
description:
Comedy, Documentary, Music
In his debut special, actor and comedian Adam Pally (Happy Endings) takes the stage in Brooklyn, NY for a hilarious and highly entertaining musical evening. With a documentary crew in tow, Pally leans into his easy charm as he divulges questionably truthful facts about his life and family – both onstage and in ongoing behind-the-scenes conversations with his director. Featuring special guests, this special puts the comedian's musical acumen on full display as he sings a mix of original and cover songs.

name: The Alabama Solution
description:
Documentary
In 2019, filmmakers Andrew Jarecki and Charlotte Kaufman (HBO's The Jinx) visit a prison where incarcerated men whisper a message: terrible things are going on and kept secret. This sparks an immersive six-year investigation into one of the nation's deadliest prison systems. Through unprecedented access and video shot on contraband cell phones, we learn of a suspicious death, revealing it isn't an isolated incident and the official version seems far from the truth. A shocking story of brutality, corruption, and a system in collapse. The Alabama Solution shines a light on inmates fighting for survival who embark on a non-violent campaign of resistance. Beyond Alabama, it exposes a national crisis that is an urgent warning about the true costs of mass incarceration.

name: The Family McMullen
description:
Comedy, Drama
Edward Burns returns as writer and director in this sequel to "The Brothers McMullen," where a now 50-something Barry, his brother Patrick, and his widowed sister-in-law Molly rediscover love while Barry's children face their own romantic dilemmas.

name: Armed Only with a Camera: The Life and Death of Brent Renaud
description:
Documentary, Family
On March 13, 2022, filmmaker Brent Renaud was killed by Russian soldiers while reporting on the war in Ukraine. Later, his younger brother and collaborator, Craig Renaud, recovered Brent's body and his final recordings and brought them back to their childhood home in Arkansas. As Brent's journey to his final resting place unfolds, the award-winning short film chronicles the years he and his brother spent covering some of the world's most dangerous conflicts. Unflinching in its depiction of death, loss, and the toll of war, the film is a tribute to Brent and all the devoted journalists who use their cameras to work for truth and understanding.

name: Caleb Hearon: Model Comedian
description:
Comedy, Reality
​In his debut stand-up special, actor, comedian, writer, and podcaster Caleb Hearon (The Devil Wears Prada 2, HBO Max's Sweethearts) takes us back to his roots in Kansas City...where it all started. Newly 30, Hearon deploys his generational Midwestern wisdom to solve most of the world's problems: politics, internet trolls, learning we're not that different from our parents, and more. Filmed at Constellation in Chicago, Caleb Hearon: Model Comedian showcases Hearon's ability to unpack life's most absurd contradictions with his signature charm and razor-sharp wit.

name: Outcome
description: Comedy, Crime, Drama

name: Les Enfoirés 2026 - La Ballade des Enfoirés
description:
Music
President Donald Trump addresses the nation.

name: Hunter Among Us
description: Thriller

name: Fearless
description:
Family
Already harassed by the neighbourhood bully for entering a hip-hop contest, two young brothers, who have never danced, have only three days to prepare and overcome the deep insecurity of one brother.

name: Stan the Man
description:
Drama
A former pro football coach spirals into addiction and loses everything. Now, he must confront his demons to lead a struggling Christian high school to its first state football championship. Can he reclaim his life before it's too late?

name: The First Snow of Fraggle Rock
description:
Comedy, Family
When the holidays are filled with unexpected adventures and challenges, the Fraggles learn to appreciate each day for being unique and special, like a snowflake.

name: The Protos Experiment
description:
Horror
A scientist tests memory implants on death row inmates, but when the experiment turns nightmarish, they must escape or lose their minds forever.

name: The Family Plan 2
description:
Action, Comedy, Family
On a family trip to London for Christmas, Dan becomes the target of an unexpected enemy.

name: Sugarhouse
description:
Drama
Abandoned by their outlaw father, Maisie and her headstrong sister turn to their troubled brother for help-unwittingly setting off a chain of events that unearth long-buried family secrets hidden within the sugarhouse.

name: Lavi 2: Scores Again
description: Comedy

name: God Bless Bitcoin
description:
Documentary
God Bless Bitcoin asks the timely question: How do we fix our broken money? Through in-depth conversations with bitcoin and interfaith religious leaders, the film exposes the broken, unjust, and immoral nature of our current fiat-based monetary system, one that is intimately connected to the military industrial complex and the propagation of war. The film also shows how and why members of the poor and middle class feel a financial squeeze even when they work hard and lead fiscally responsible lives. God Bless Bitcoin ultimately suggests the ways in which bitcoin can present alternatives to our current system that are more just, equitable, and peaceful.

name: Eternity
description:
Comedy, Drama, Fantasy
Elizabeth Olsen must choose to spend eternity with either her husband or her first love.

name: The Lost Bus
description:
History
A determined father risks everything to save a teacher and her students from a raging wildfire. Inspired by true events.

name: Hard Justice
description:
Action
Marine Grace Thompson joins the LAPD following in the footsteps of her brother Michael. But when Michael is murdered, Eva must piece together the puzzle by following leads of corruption and coverups that run deeper than she ever imagined, ending up in an action-packed, blood-soaked finale.

name: Stiller & Meara: Nothing Is Lost
description:
Documentary
Ben Stiller tells the story of his parents, comedy icons Jerry Stiller and Anne Meara.

name: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime the Movie: Tears of the Azure Sea
description: Animation, Fantasy

name: Asymmetric Disclosure
description:
Documentary
Dr. Steven Greer uncovers suppressed evidence, revealing that advanced extraterrestrial technology is being intentionally withheld from the public.

name: Let's Both Try
description:
Drama
Alice and Tommy are newlywed photographers whose love and faith are tested when Tommy embarks on a nude photography project. In response, Alice chooses to pose for another photographer.

name: The Pickup
description:
Action, Comedy
A routine cash pickup takes a wild turn when mismatched armored truck drivers Russell (Eddie Murphy) and Travis (Pete Davidson) are ambushed by ruthless criminals led by savvy mastermind Zoe (Keke Palmer). As chaos erupts, the unlikely duo must navigate danger, clashing personalities, and one very bad day that keeps spiraling out of control.

name: Black Hawk Down
description:
Documentary
The story behind the infamous downing of an American Black Hawk helicopter by Somali gunmen, this doc offers an in depth look at the troubled US intervention in Somalia - the deadliest US military engagement since the Vietnam War. This gripping doc reconstructs the pitched street battles between US Marines, Army Rangers and Somalis using US army broadcasts from the event, and assess the fallout.

name: Jethro Tull: Nothing Is Easy - Live at the Isle of Wight 1970
description:
Documentary, Music
600,000 people at this festival witnessed one of Jethro Tull's most impressive performances. The film tells the events leading up to it as well as the performance itself with a contribution from Ian Anderson describing the dramatic almost violent festival moods both backstage and in the audience.  As he said "it was a watershed time" between peace and love on one hand and hooliganism on the other.

name: Fragments for Venus
description:
Documentary
Alice Diop colors in the blind spots of art history with this thoughtful short starring Kayije Kagame (Saint Omer). Countering clichés and absences in Black portraiture with the joys of real life, Fragments for Venus leaves behind Old Masters to widen the frame on where we find aesthetic pleasure.

name: Pompei: Below the Clouds
description: Documentary

name: Agon
description: Drama

name: The Piano Accident
description:
Comedy
Magalie, a social media sensation famous for posting shocking content online, takes a break after suffering a serious accident while filming one of her videos. Isolated in a mountain chalet with her personal assistant, her retreat is interrupted by a journalist who begins to blackmail her.

name: You Hide Me
description:
Documentary
Banned for anti-British sentiment even in recently liberated Ghana, this short casts essential light on African art’s histories of circulation and exhibition. Illuminating the myriad hypocrisies of colonial forces, Nii Kwate Owoo’s radical show-and-tell unambiguously calls for immediate restitution.

name: Untitled 77-A
description: Wielding a sharp pair of gleaming scissors, Han Okhi mounts a revolution out of jagged, fragmentary images in this intrepid short. Beautifully restored, this watershed work of Korean feminist cinema slashes at the pretence of censorship, laying bare the patriarchal control behind arbitrary dogmas.

name: Tavern Man
description:
Drama
Having just finished Le Havre in the titular French city, Aki Kaurismäki hopped over to Guimarães, Portugal to shoot his segment of the anthology film Centro Historico. Attuned to the gentle rhythms of the small tourist town, Tavern Man is a yearning, dialogue-free meditation on unfulfilled dreams.

name: Autobiography of a Handbag
description:
Drama
Returning to the whimsical love for fashion that shone in Caprice, Joanna Hogg finds an improbable protagonist in a designer handbag in this short film. Complemented by lavishly tactile, immersive imagery, the luxury item speaks with wry humor not only to the fickleness of trends, but fate itself.

name: The Mastermind
description:
Crime
With an artful eye and jazzy unpredictability, Kelly Reichardt unravels the threads of the heist film in this standout from Cannes. As an antihero kicking about on the brink of the ‘70s, Josh O’Connor is unmissable, lending rumpled discontent to this ironic, wry vision of American individualism.

name: Muse
description:
Drama
Filmed on the fabled Greek island of Hydra, Paweł Pawlikowski’s playful, virtuosic short is a modern myth that dazzles in dynamic black and white. Adding flashes of high fashion to shades of early cinema, model and actor Małgosia Bela strikes the poses of a fearless muse with chameleonic style.

name: L'avance
description: Aliou, a burgeoning student at Les Beaux-Arts in Paris, sells a painting of his dead mother for 3000 euros to a famous collector. Upon delivering the painting, he is taken on a journey through which he will bear the burden of the money he has just earned.

name: The Watchman
description:
Drama, Mystery
Haunted by absences and uncanny visions, Ali Cherri’s eerie short soon slips from an atmosphere of suspense into a more surreal realm. Making potent use of nightmarish imagery, the acclaimed Lebanese visual artist crafts a poetic allegory for the absurdity of conflict with poignant force and care.

name: Being John Smith
description: What’s in a name? Multitudes, according to this refractive portrait of the artist as an old man from avant-garde legend John Smith. Narrated with signature wit, this mischievous study of self-identity hints at the deeper mysteries beneath unassuming names and plain surfaces.

name: My Undesirable Friends: Part I - Last Air in Moscow
description: Documentary

name: Endless Cookie
description:
Animation, Comedy, Documentary
Two half-brothers, one Indigenous and one white, embark on a journey through time and place. They travel from their remote home in Shamattawa to the vibrant urban landscape of the 1980s.

name: Magic Farm
description:
Comedy
Things get weird in Amalia Ulman’s kaleidoscopic film, a colorful comedy of errors and an imaginative send-up of millennial media. Starring Simon Rex and Chloë Sevigny, this story of a frantic search for an internet sensation is electrified by wit, subversion, and distinctively fluorescent style.

name: Four Unloved Women, Adrift on a Purposeless Sea, Experience the Ecstasy of Dissection
description:
Horror
No stranger to the sensual and medical contours of the body, horror icon David Cronenberg turns to 18th-century wax cadavers as his new muses for this poetic short. Sonically caressed by a chorus of pleasurable sighs, these anatomical Venuses are both alluring and uncanny in their voluptuousness.

name: Bad for a Moment
description:
Drama
Mocking contemporary city life, this swift, sharp comedy from rising-star director Daniel Soares earned a special mention at Cannes. Toggling between sleek, shiny new buildings and raging scenes of destruction, these vignettes regard the Portuguese housing crisis with dark and blazing wit.

name: A Place Without Fear
description:
Animation, Fantasy
Artist, designer, and filmmaker Susanne Deeken draws on our intimate associations with the home for this surreal trip into a haunted soul. Evocative of both children’s drawings and horror films, A Place Without Fear uses analog and digital techniques to conjure a nightmarish vision all its own.

name: Beauty Is Not a Sin
description:
Drama
Playing irreverently with the religious iconography of Italy, Nicolas Winding Refn comes tantalizingly close to sacrilege in this erotically charged short. Created for motorcycle brand MV Agusta and premiering at the Venice Film Festival, this striking advert surrenders to delicious temptation.

name: Secrets of the Conclave
description:
Documentary
Unmask the history of papal conclaves, from the earliest church history through today. Explore how voting for a Pope has changed over time, through political intrigue, Renaissance corruption and modern changes by Popes John Paul II and Benedict XVI.

name: Game Changers
description:
Documentary
Science breaks down boundaries and grows knowledge. Achievements build on one another and provide stepping stones to the future. From the latest in biotech to secrets buried in the Earth's surface to outer space, these are the Breakthroughs that have made history—and changed it forever.

name: Cleopatra's Final Secret
description:
Documentary, History
Kathleen Martinez’s 20-year hunt for Cleopatra’s tomb leads her and a team offshore to explore a mysterious sunken site.

name: Echo
description:
Documentary
In Antarctica, a state-of-the-art robotic penguin, called ECHO, is changing the way scientists monitor wildlife. The autonomous yellow robot has been integrated into the penguin colony and is using remote sensing technology to monitor these now-endangered penguin colonies.

name: Kishkindhapuri
description: Horror, Mystery

name: Traders of the Lost Scrolls
description:
Documentary
A real-life Indiana Jones, who is a professor and entrepreneur, hunts for the remaining Dead Sea Scrolls, certain he can find the missing manuscripts.

name: Promises & Betrayals: Britain and the Struggle for the Holy Land
description:
Documentary, History, War
This documentary outlines the ways in which British policies during the First World War have contributed to the instability of the Middle East region today. Through never-before-seen documents and photos, we look at the secret agenda of the British government in WWI and its unfortunate aftermath.

name: The Quest for the True Cross
description:
Documentary, History
In a Church in Rome is a piece of wood. It is clearly inscribed with the remains of the line, 'Jesus of Nazareth, King of the Jews. This is a fascinating detective story, about a small walnut headboard, which may have been attached to the true cross immediately before the crucifixion.

name: The Disappearance Of The PX-15
description:
Documentary
Launched in the shadow of Apollo 11 in 1969, six men were sealed inside a tiny deep-sea capsule and set adrift. Their mission: to survive for 30 days exploring the depths of the Gulf Stream.  We follow marine archaeologist James Delgado as he recovers the sub and reunites the surviving “aquanauts”.

name: The Ark of the Covenant Revealed
description:
Documentary
Join scientists as they discuss the Ark of the Covenant, and if this mysterious ancient device could possibly be replicated today.

name: Tutankhamun's Fireball
description:
Documentary
The	story of how a mysterious gem in one of Tutankhamun’s necklaces led to the discovery of a dramatic new cosmic threat. The gem was recently identified as a type of glass found in the middle of the Egyptian Sahara. But why is this beautiful glass scattered about in the desert?

name: Superfish
description:
Documentary, Family
"Superfish" is a one-hour documentary revealing the secrets of billfish. Renowned for their formidable spears or sword-like bills, and prized by sport-fishermen around the world, this spectacular group of ocean super-stars includes marlin, swordfish, and sailfish.

name: Hitler's Secret Science
description:
Documentary
In the crucible of World War II, Germany's most brilliant scientists raced to create an arsenal of terrifying new weapons of mass destruction, even an atomic bomb. Before the war ended, they produced a series of technological firsts that were the basis for many modern day air and spacecraft. This documentary highlights the inventions of Wernher von Braun, Werner Heisenberg, and many others.

name: The Emperor's Lost Harbour
description:
Documentary
In this fascinating documentary, builders of a new transportation network in the heart of a great city make a sensational archeological find.

name: Valiente: A Tracker Story
description:
Animation
Tracker and Carlos come across animals fleeing the Shadow Jungle.

name: Star Clock BC
description:
Documentary
Over a century ago, sponge divers recovered a complex mechanical device from a shipwreck. Scientists continue to marvel at this machine, developed by the Greeks around the 1st century B.C., with its intricate system of gears that accurately chart the astronomical movement of the moon and planets.

name: Operation Dolittle
description:
Documentary
Whether it’s grunting, mooing, bellowing or “rumbling” – animals have an astonishing range of voices. Scientists around the world are conducting research into the sounds made by various species. Are animal noises a kind of “language”? Will we ultimately be able to “talk” with certain animals?

name: Elephant King
description:
Documentary
Mayhem is about to break out in Namibia's Etosha National Park. This sprawling, arid land plays host to the highest concentration of elephants on Earth, and they've recently lost their leader. The quest to become the new elephant king is on, and the candidates are all six-ton giants, willing to throw their weight around. Join ecologist Caitlin O'Connell as she documents the pachyderm politics and unlocks the secrets of this elephant society. From her hidden bunker, mere feet from the turbulent battle, O'Connell will decipher the meaning of their actions as the fight for the crown unfolds.

name: Lionsrock: Return Of The King
description:
Documentary
This documentary touches on a very special relationship between animals and humans in a little piece of Africa transplanted from Europe. These transplanted lions will live out their lives in a happier, more natural environment than they knew in Europe - but they will never become truly wild again…

name: Mammoths: Giants of the Ice Age
description:
Documentary
Accompany Dick Mol, the world-famous expert on mammoths, as he traces the original mammoths back to Namibia, trawls the bottom of the North Sea for mammoth fossils and, with the help of gold-diggers in northern Canada, digs up perfectly preserved mammoth bones from the permafrost.

name: The Great Australian Fly
description:
Documentary
Inventive and entertaining, this documentary combines quirky archive, “fly-cam” footage, animation, personal stories, and the latest macro-technology to create an unusual tale of the fly, this most irritating yet vital species. What can we learn from this tiny but fascinating nuisance?

name: Wild Venice
description:
Documentary
Explore a lesser-known part of Venice: the wild side! In coral reefs and hidden gardens, find everything from poisonous mammals to strange sea life.

name: The Roots of To Your Eternity
description: Animation, Documentary

name: GREAT PRETENDER razbliuto
description: This all-new action-adventure film follows Dorothy, the self-proclaimed genius con artist who recruited the infamous Laurent Thierry to the life of crime. This time around, she has been defeated at her own game by the Shanghai Longu Bang and is thought to be dead, but she soon reemerges in a small seaside village. Pursued by the underworld of Taipei, she heads to Kyoto, but what will she find...

name: Me & Roboco: The Movie
description:
Animation, Comedy
Ten-year-old Taira Bondo is a normal grade school student who spends his days like he’s living a comedy, alongside his OrderMaid, Roboco. One day, Roboco gets a sudden knee notification as worlds collide! Someone has disrupted space-time, and now, various Robocos from the multiverse begin to gather…

name: The Bartender
description: Drama

name: Chainsaw Man - The Movie: Reze Arc
description:
Action, Adventure, Animation
Based on the hugely popular anime series, Chainsaw Man continues in an all-new epic, action-fueled adventure. Amid a brutal war between devils and hunters, another battle starts in Denji's heart when he meets a mysterious girl named Reze. Facing secret enemies and fighting for his humanity, Denji revs up for his deadliest battle yet.

name: Fuuto PI: The Portrait of Kamen Rider Skull
description:
Action, Adventure, Animation
Shotaro tells Tokime all about his mentor, Shokichi Narumi, and the night he and Philip became Kamen Rider W.

name: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle
description:
Action, Adventure, Animation
Tanjiro Kamado – a boy who joined an organization dedicated to hunting down demons called the Demon Slayer Corps after his younger sister Nezuko was turned into a demon.

While growing stronger and deepening his friendships and bonds with fellow corps members, Tanjiro has battled many demons with his comrades, Zenitsu Agatsuma and Inosuke Hashibira. Along the way, his journey has led him to fight alongside the Demon Slayer Corps’ highest-ranking swordsmen, the Hashira, including Flame Hashira Kyojuro Rengoku aboard the Mugen Train, Sound Hashira Tengen Uzui within the Entertainment District, as well as Mist Hashira Muichiro Tokito and Love Hashira Mitsuri Kanroji at the Swordsmith Village.

As the Demon Slayer Corps members and Hashira engaged in a group strength training program, the Hashira Training, in preparation for the forthcoming battle against the demons, Muzan Kibutsuji appears at the Ubuyashiki Mansion. With the head of the Demon Corps in danger, Tanjiro and the Hashira rush to the headquarters but are plunged into a deep descent to a mysterious space by the hands of Muzan Kibutsuji.

The destination of where Tanjiro and Demon Slayer Corps have fallen is the demons’ stronghold – the Infinity Castle.

And so, the battleground is set as the final battle between the Demon Slayer Corps and the demons ignites.

name: Aldnoah.Zero (Re+)
description: Action, Animation, Science Fiction

name: My Hero Academia: You're Next
description:
Action, Adventure, Animation
Deku and his Hero Course classmates at U.A. High are determined to carry on the ideals of All Might. After Deku faces Tomura Shigaraki, a mysterious figure emerges resembling All Might. When the heroes uncover his devious plans, he is revealed to be Dark Might. He unleashes his Quirk to create a massive fort, absorbing all in its path. It’s up to Class 1-A to stop Dark Might and save the world!

name: Fureru
description:
Animation, Drama, Fantasy
Aki, Ryo, and Yuta grew up on a tiny Japanese island with Fureru, a small yellow hedgehog with mysterious powers. Now in their 20s and chasing a fresh start in Tokyo, the trio tries to build new lives while keeping their unusual companion out of sight. But as Fureru’s powers awaken, buried emotions and old tensions reemerge, pushing their friendship into unpredictable new territory.

name: Dashavatar
description: Drama, Thriller

name: Bloody Escape: Bats Out of Hell
description:
Action, Animation, Science Fiction
After being transformed into a cyborg, Kisaragi faces pursuit by multiple organizations: the Immortal Knights—a band of vampires out to conquer a divided Tokyo—and a group of yakuza sworn to avenge their fallen leader. The curtain rises on a grand and bloody three-way battle.

name: Trapezium
description:
Animation
High school student Yu Azuma will do whatever it takes to become an idol. She’s even sworn to stay off social media and promises not to get a boyfriend. Ready to make her dream a reality, she decides to find three other girls from the four corners of her prefecture to form an idol group. But the road to stardom hides unexpected trials that threaten to undo all she’s worked for.

name: The Stars Align
description:
Drama
Toma Shinjo has one mission: save his school’s tennis team. And his only hope rests on the talent of Maki Katsuragi, who’s reluctant to part from his studies. This will be the team’s last summer together unless they convince Maki to step on the court!

name: Offside
description:
Drama
OFFSIDE

name: SPY x FAMILY CODE: White
description:
Action, Animation, Comedy
He's a spy. She's an assassin. Together, Loid and Yor keep their double lives to themselves. However, their adopted daughter Anya, a telepath, knows both of their exciting secrets unbeknownst to them. While under the guise of taking his family on a weekend getaway, Loid's attempt to make progress on his current mission proves difficult when Anya mistakenly gets involved!

name: The Concierge
description:
Adventure, Animation, Family
Welcome to the Hokkyoku Department Store! This unusual shop caters exclusively to animals, furry and feathered alike. Akino is a new concierge in training and she’s quickly realizing the high demands of her customers—especially those on the extinct species list. From a sea mink searching for a special gift to a laughing owl looking to please his wife, can she fulfill every request?

name: SSSS.DYNAZENON Grand Episode
description:
Action, Adventure, Animation
High schooler Yomogi comes across Gauma, a strange drifter claiming to be a Kaiju User. Soon after, a Kaiju attacks, and Gauma summons the giant robot Dynazenon to fight it. Yomogi, his classmate Yume, and local NEET Koyomi are caught in the chaos and join as copilots. Together, they form the Gauma Team. But Kaiju Eugenicists, a secret society of teens with special powers, stand in their way.

name: Psycho-Pass: Providence
description:
Action, Animation, Crime
PSYCHO-PASS: Providence

name: Marudase Kintarou
description:
Animation
Makoto, a student and chairman at Onodera Academy has been targeted by the whole academy because of the will left by the previous principal: “The one man who is able to seduce Makoto with his superb sexual techniques will be given the right to take over as Onodera Academy's new principal!” But thanks to Kintaro, his bodyguard and boyfriend, Makoto has regained his peaceful life. One day, ...

name: All the Devils Are Here
description:
Mystery, Thriller
After a heist, four criminals lay low in a remote safehouse, waiting for orders. As paranoia builds, one thing becomes clear—the real threat may not be outside, but among them.

name: The Stranger in My Home
description:
Drama, Thriller
Ali and her daughter Katie have a perfect life - until a stranger claims to be Katie's father. As secrets unravel, his obsession turns dangerous, pulling them into a web of lies and fear. Based on the bestselling novel.

name: Trust
description:
Thriller
After a scandal, a Hollywood starlet (Sophie Turner) retreats to a remote cabin-but she's not alone. Betrayed by the man she trusted most, she's trapped in a brutal game of survival. She can hide, but she can't run.

name: Tepeyac
description: Animation

name: Heart Eyes
description:
Comedy, Horror, Mystery
When the "Heart Eyes Killer" strikes, a pair of co-workers pulling overtime on Valentine’s Day are mistaken for a couple by the elusive couple-hunting killer. Now they must spend the most romantic night of the year running for their lives.

name: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
description:
Action, Adventure, Thriller
Our lives are the sum of our choices. Tom Cruise is Ethan Hunt in Mission: Impossible – The Final Reckoning.

name: Dog Man
description:
Action, Adventure, Animation
While learning to embrace his new identity, Dog Man must stop feline supervillain Petey the Cat from cloning himself and going on a crime spree.

name: Love Hurts
description:
Action, Comedy, Romance
A realtor is pulled back into the life he left behind after his former partner in crime resurfaces with an ominous message, and with his crime-lord brother also on his trail, he must confront his past and the history he never fully buried.

name: Drop
description:
Mystery, Thriller
Emmy nominee Meghann Fahy, breakout star of White Lotus, plays Violet, a widowed mother on her first date in years, who arrives at an upscale restaurant where she is relieved that her date, Henry (Brandon Sklenar) is more charming and handsome than she expected. But their chemistry begins to curdle as Violet begins being irritated and then terrorized by a series of anonymous drops to her phone.

name: The Woman in the Yard
description:
Horror, Thriller
From Blumhouse, the most successful global brand in horror, comes a original chiller starring Danielle Deadwyler as Ramona, a woman crippled by grief after she survives a car accident that takes her husband (Hornsby). Seriously injured, Ramona now must care for their 14-year-old son and 6-year-old-daughter, alone in her rural farmhouse. Then one day the woman takes form in their yard.

name: Novocaine
description:
Action, Comedy, Crime
Nathan Caine (Jack Quaid) was born with a rare genetic disorder where he can't feel any pain. When the girl of his dreams (Amber Midthunder) is taken hostage in a bank heist, he turns his inability to feel physical pain into an unexpected strength in the fight to get her back.

name: Black Bag
description:
Drama, Mystery
From Director Steven Soderbergh, BLACK BAG is a gripping spy drama about legendary intelligence agents George Woodhouse and his beloved wife Kathryn. When she is suspected of betraying the nation, George faces the ultimate test – loyalty to his marriage or his country.

name: M3GAN 2.0
description:
Action, Science Fiction, Thriller
Two years after M3GAN, a marvel of artificial intelligence, went rogue and embarked on a murderous (and impeccably choreographed) rampage and was subsequently destroyed, M3GAN’s creator Gemma has become a high-profile author and advocate for government oversight of A.I. Meanwhile, Gemma’s niece Cady, now 14, has become a teenager, rebelling against Gemma’s overprotective rules.

name: The Critic
description:
Crime, Drama, Mystery
Adapted from the best-selling novel of the same, this murder mystery drama follows the unlikely friendship between an ageing theatre critic and a struggling West End actress when she witnesses the brutal murder by a notorious serial killer. Fearing for her own life, and unable to turn to the police, the pair are thrown into a vicious web of blackmail and deceit.

name: Wicked
description:
Fantasy, Romance
An unlikely friendship emerges between Elphaba and Glinda, two clashing witches in the magical land of Oz. Elphaba is wrongfully cast as a wicked witch as she seeks to expose the fraudulent, corrupt Wizard who rules the land.

name: Strangers
description:
Crime, Thriller
Seeking revenge on her abusive husband, a woman’s life takes a dark turn when she meets a mysterious hitman and is drawn into a whirlwind romance that spirals into a dangerous vigilante spree.

name: Friendship
description:
Comedy
Suburban dad Craig (Tim Robinson) falls hard for his charismatic new neighbor (Paul Rudd), but Craig's attempts to make an adult male friend threaten to ruin both of their lives. Co-starring Kate Mara and Jack Dylan Grazer. Written and directed by Andrew DeYoung.

name: Millers in Marriage
description:
Drama
Three siblings navigate life’s next chapter in this heartfelt drama about love and second chances. Andy dives into dating after divorce, Eve wrestles with a distant husband and old dreams, and Maggie finds her empty nest is quieter than she’d hoped.

name: Klitschko: More Than a Fight
description:
Documentary, War
Boxer-turned-mayor of Kyiv Vitali Klitschko and his brother Wladimir fight for Ukraine. Sky Original documentary from Oscar winner Kevin Macdonald.

name: Bhagwat - Chapter One: Raakshas
description: Crime, Thriller

name: Saunkan Saunkanay 2
description: Comedy

name: Kargil 1999- The Untold Story of the Indian Air Force
description:
Documentary, History, War
In 1999, the Indian Air Force fought the world’s highest aerial battle. 25 years later, we explore the meticulous planning and technical efforts behind it, modifying aircraft with countermeasure systems. Through logbooks, war diaries, footage, and veteran interviews, it was revealed how the IAF's efforts were pivotal in reclaiming crucial high-altitude posts that were intruded by Pakistan.

name: Tehran
description:
Action, Thriller
After a deadly car bombing, a Delhi police officer finds himself caught in a covert conspiracy as international peace hangs in the balance.

name: Sumathi Valavu
description: Horror

name: JSK - Janaki V vs State of Kerala
description: Action, Drama, Thriller

name: Kaalidhar Laapata
description: Comedy, Drama

name: Ranganayaka
description: Comedy

name: Detective Sherdil
description: Comedy, Mystery

name: Bhairavam
description: Action

name: Aamar Boss
description: Drama, Family

name: Episode
description: Drama

name: Chhota Bhai
description:
Comedy, Drama
 Annapoorna is forced to look after her husband's young step-brother Ramlal. She has her own child to look after but takes on Ramu's responsibility as well. But what happens when Ramu's real mother comes to claim her son? The film explores the conflict that goes on within Annapoorna as a mother.

name: Jury Duty Presents: Company Retreat
description: Comedy

name: Ek Paheli
description:
Horror, Mystery
Dr. Sudhir buys an old piano after which strange things start happening as meets Maria who asks him to not let anyone else play the piano. Those who go against this advice start turning up dead.

name: Anjaam
description:
Action, Crime
Anjaam is a 1978 Hindi action film starring Nutan, Sachin, Sarika and Ramesh Deo.

name: The Golden Ivy
description: Drama

name: Jyoti
description:
Drama
 Jyoti is a 1981 drama movie starring Jeetendra, Hema Malini, Ashok Kumar and Ajit. When Raja Sahab meets Gauri, he gets impressed with her and asks her to marry his son Niranjan. But Niranjanâ€™s mother opposes the relationship and suggests that Gauri should marry the elder son Govind, a senile man. Will Gauri be able to change hers and Govindâ€™s life?

name: Amar Geeti
description: Drama

name: Outlander
description:
Adventure, Drama, Fantasy
After serving as a British Army nurse in World War II, Claire Randall is enjoying a second honeymoon in Scotland with husband Frank, an MI6 officer looking forward to a new career as an Oxford historian. Suddenly, Claire is transported to 1743 and into a mysterious world where her freedom and life are threatened. To survive, she marries Jamie Fraser, a strapping Scots warrior with a complicated past and a disarming sense of humor. A passionate relationship ensues, and Claire is caught between two vastly different men in two inharmonious lives. "Outlander" is adapted from the best-selling books by Diana Gabaldon.

name: Pursuit of Jade
description:
Drama, Romance
A humble woman marries a disgraced noble to protect her family, but as their love becomes real, she follows him into battle to fight for their future.

name: ONE PIECE
description:
Action, Adventure
With his straw hat and ragtag crew, young pirate Monkey D. Luffy goes on an epic voyage for treasure in this live-action adaptation of the popular manga.

name: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
description:
Adventure, Animation
After the party of heroes defeated the Demon King, they restored peace to the land and returned to lives of solitude. Generations pass, and the elven mage Frieren comes face to face with humanity’s mortality. She takes on a new apprentice and promises to fulfill old friends’ dying wishes. Can an elven mind make peace with the nature of life and death? Frieren embarks on her quest to find out.

name: Virgin River
description:
Drama, Romance
Searching for a fresh start, a nurse practitioner moves from LA to a remote northern California town and is surprised by what — and who — she finds.

name: Boyfriend on Demand
description:
Comedy, Drama, Fantasy
Seo Mi-rae is worn out by work. Love? It's the last thing on her mind. But a virtual dating service sparks feelings — and maybe a real shot at romance.

name: JUJUTSU KAISEN
description:
Action, Adventure, Animation
Although born with tremendous power, Itadori Yuji lives a completely ordinary life. One day, to save a classmate, he eats a cursed finger, and now Ryomen Sukuna lives in Itadori’s soul. Guided by the Jujutsu Sorcerers, he joins the Tokyo Metropolitan Jujutsu Technical High School, an organization that fights the curses. Now begins the heroic tale of a boy who became a curse to end a curse.

name: Hell's Paradise
description:
Action, Adventure, Animation
Gabimaru reigns as the strongest and most ruthless assassin in his village. But now finds himself on death row—with only one way out: retrieve the Elixir of Life from a sinister island. Longing for freedom, he accepts the challenge. But with fellow convicts vying for the same prize and demonic beasts lurking, how will Gabimaru survive this harrowing quest?

name: Sesame Street
description:
Animation, Comedy
The beloved show "Sesame Street" combines education and entertainment to make a meaningful difference in children's lives. Besides teaching letters and numbers, "Sesame Street" fosters imagination, builds social skills, and models respect for people's differences, whether they're based in race, gender, ethnicity, googly eyes, or neon fur.

name: Phantom Lawyer
description:
Drama, Mystery
Possessed lawyer hunts the truth behind eerie cases to deliver thrilling justice for the vengeful dead!

name: Bridgerton
description:
Drama, Romance
In a new tale from the ton, eternal bachelor Benedict Bridgerton finally meets his match: a captivating lady's maid in disguise at a masquerade ball.

name: 【OSHI NO KO】
description:
Animation, Drama, Fantasy
Dr. Gorou Amamiya is shocked when a pregnant star, Ai Hoshino, appears at his countryside clinic. After secretly delivering Ai's baby, Dr. Goro is murdered by her obsessive stalker. Reborn as Ai's new child, Aquamarine Hoshino, he embarks on a quest to help his mother rise to the top. What can a child do about the dark underbelly of the entertainment industry? And what if disaster strikes?

name: The Dinosaurs
description:
Documentary, History
From the first dinosaurs to the last, this epic documentary series examines their 165 million years on Earth and the forces that shaped their evolution.

name: Love Is Blind
description:
Reality, Romance
After dating sight unseen, single men and women put the power of love to the test. Will their romantic connections matter more than their looks?

name: BEASTARS
description:
Animation, Crime, Drama
This coming-of-age drama about the turbulent school life of anthropomorphic animals is "something truly special" and "a standout anime series" (IGN).

name: Formula 1: Drive to Survive
description:
Documentary
Drivers, managers and team owners live life in the fast lane, both on and off the track, during one cutthroat season of Formula 1 racing.

name: Vladimir
description:
Drama
When an English professor becomes obsessed with a handsome new colleague, her already complicated marriage and career are thrown into total chaos.

name: The Night Agent
description:
Action, Drama, Thriller
Recruited by a secret U.S. intelligence program, agent Peter Sutherland must unravel a political conspiracy to prevent a terrorist attack.

name: Silent Truth
description:
Crime, Mystery
When a detective returns to his hometown to investigate a murder case, he uncovers shocking connections to the primary suspect and the weapon.

name: That Night
description:
Crime, Mystery
When a young, naïve single mother gets embroiled in a murder during an island getaway, her sisters rush to help. But they only make things worse.

name: Cross
description:
Action, Crime, Drama
Based on NY Times Bestselling author James Patterson’s #1 hero, Cross is a crime thriller that follows the investigations of brilliant forensic psychologist and DC Metro Detective Alex Cross. Together with his best friend and partner Detective John Sampson, Cross delves into the psyches of America’s most insidious killers while fighting to protect his family from the dangers of the criminal world

name: Aspirants
description:
Drama
Aspirants is a story of 3 friends - Abhilash, SK, and Guri. The story takes place in the past and the present where the past captures the struggle and the drama behind the making of UPSC aspirants in Old Rajinder Nagar of Delhi, while the present talks about the aftermath. Watch on Amazon miniTV

name: Good Sports with Kevin Hart and Kenan Thompson
description: Kevin Hart and Kenan Thompson break down their favorite moments from the NFL, NBA and the wide, weird world of sports with colorful commentary on highlights, sketches, celebrity and athlete interviews.

name: Young Sherlock
description:
Action, Adventure, Mystery
From Guy Ritchie, witness the legendary origin story of Sherlock Holmes in this irreverent, action-laden mystery that follows the iconic detective's early adventures.

name: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy
description:
Action, Adventure
Young cadets train to become Starfleet officers as they navigate friendships, rivalries and romance, all while facing an enemy that threatens both the Academy and the Federation.

name: NCIS: Sydney
description:
Action, Adventure, Crime
With rising tensions in the Indo-Pacific, a team of US NCIS and AFP Agents are grafted into a multi-national taskforce to keep naval crimes in check in the most contested patch of ocean on the planet.

name: The Madison
description:
Action, Drama
Shattered by an unthinkable tragedy, the Clyburns uproot their comfortable lives in New York City and move to the wild, untamed beauty of rural Montana in search of connection.

name: Scarpetta
description:
Crime, Drama, Mystery
Renowned forensic pathologist Dr. Kay Scarpetta returns to her position as Virginia's Chief Medical Examiner, where she investigates a haunting murder with eerie reminders from her first big case decades ago. In 1998, Scarpetta works alongside Detective Pete Marino and FBI Agent Benton Wesley as they investigate a series of brutal stranglings. Based on the best-selling novels by Patricia Cornwell.

name: Fallout
description:
Action, Adventure
Based on one of the greatest video games of all time, Fallout is the story of haves and have-nots in a world in which there’s almost nothing left to have. 200 years after the apocalypse, the gentle denizens of luxury fallout shelters are forced to return to the incredibly complex, gleefully weird and highly violent universe waiting for them above.

name: The Silent Noise
description: Crime, Drama, Thriller

name: Final Siren: Inside the AFL
description:
Documentary
In one of the tightest seasons in AFL history, Final Siren follows seven of the game's biggest names - Marcus Bontempelli, Nat Fyfe, Max Gawn, Toby Greene, Touk Miller, Cam Rayner and Dayne Zorko - as public doubt, online abuse, injuries, ageing, suspensions, and fierce rivalries threaten to derail what could be their shot at Premiership glory.

name: This Is Not a Dating Show
description:
Comedy, Reality
A live comedy and improvisation show, every episode of This Is Not A Dating Show brings together 100 singles who have been seriously unlucky in love. A difficult task, but nothing Galder Varas can't handle. And if nobody hooks up, at least we'll have had a laugh.

name: Bandwaale
description:
Comedy, Drama
Mariam, a young poetess, finds herself trapped in a sleepy town, where every young girl's future lies in wedlock. Mariam hopes to find her freedom against all odds, by uploading her poetry on the internet through an anonymous account.Along with her band of misfits - Robo and Psy, Mariam discovers the power of her poetry and her own voice.

name: Jesy Nelson: Life After Little Mix
description:
Documentary
Exclusive and intimate documentary following Jesy Nelson as she becomes a mother for the first time, while reflecting on the years which made her famous in Little Mix. Raw, tender and empowering, it captures her emotional journey - from the joys and heartbreaks of a troubled pregnancy to redefining her identity beyond fame. For the first time, Jesy reveals the truth behind her split from the band.

name: Soul Power: The Legend of the American Basketball Association
description:
Documentary
Experience the ABA's nine-year rivalry with the NBA that changed basketball forever. From the 3-point shot to the Slam Dunk Contest, the ABA's innovations became game staples. Told by "Dr. J" Erving, Larry Brown, Bob Costas & other Hall of Famers.

name: Bait
description: Comedy, Science Fiction

name: LOL Talent Show: Mexico
description:
Comedy
In the first season of LOL Talent Show: Mexico, everything is a surprise. Eugenio Derbez, Michelle Rodríguez, Capi Pérez, and Adal Ramones travel across Mexico in search of comedians with the "LOL gene." From Monterrey to Mérida, the hopeful face unexpected challenges and extreme tests. Only the best will win a spot inside the LOL house, in a stiff competition of who can get the most laughs.

name: Pelayo: Más Allá Del Límite
description:
Action, Documentary
After over 20 years fighting drug trafficking, Pelayo decides to follow the drug trail to its origin. In Colombia, he joins elite army units and experiences real operations in jungles, rivers and mountains. On this journey he discovers that behind each consignment there is poverty and abandonment. Pelayo: más allá del límite reveals the dark side of a global war.

name: MrBeast: Epic Adventures!
description: In this season, MrBeast takes friends and contestants on journeys into crazy environments. They are presented with challenges from obstacle courses and laser mazes to ancient temples, sinking trains, and dangerous traps. Only those who stay calm under pressure can thrive in these wild conditions.

name: Paradise
description:
Action, Drama, Thriller
Tranquility explodes when a shocking murder occurs and a high-stakes investigation unfolds.

name: High Potential
description:
Crime, Drama
Morgan, a single mom with three kids and an exceptional mind, helps solve an unsolvable crime when she rearranges some evidence during her shift as a cleaner for the police department. When they discover she has a knack for putting things in order because of her high intellectual potential, she is brought on as a consultant to work with a by-the-book seasoned detective, Karadec. Together they form an unusual and unstoppable team.

name: The Beauty
description:
Drama, Horror, Mystery
When international supermodels begin dying in gruesome and mysterious ways, two FBI agents are sent to Paris, Venice, Rome and New York to uncover the truth behind these deaths and end up discovering a conspiracy that threatens the future of humanity.

name: Love Story
description:
Drama, Romance
The complex and heartbreaking journey of a couple whose private love became a national obsession.

name: Grey's Anatomy
description:
Drama, Romance
Meet Meredith Grey, a brilliant first-year surgical intern at Seattle Grace Hospital. Together with her fellow residents-in-training, Meredith navigates her way through the daily traumas and social landmines of life inside the hospital and out in the real world.

name: Scrubs
description:
Comedy
J.D. and Turk scrub in together for the first time in a long time.

Action, Drama, Thriller
The lives of emergency responders who risk their lives to save others.

name: Tracker
description:
Crime, Drama
Tracker stars Justin Hartley as Colter Shaw, a lone-wolf survivalist who roams the country as a reward seeker, using his expert tracking skills to help private citizens and law enforcement solve all manner of mysteries while contending with his own fractured family. The series is based on the bestselling novel The Never Game by Jeffery Deaver.

name: Battle of Fates
description:
Reality
Is our fate predetermined? And can anyone truly read it? A groundbreaking competition dares to find out. Korea's top 49 top Fate Readers—masters of shamanism, saju, tarot, and face reading—put their pride on the line. Only those who can genuinely read fate will survive. Who will be the winner?

The following contains depictions of suicidal ideation. Viewer discretion is advised.

name: Girl on the Run: The Hunt for America's Most Wanted Woman
description:
Documentary
Branded the "Female Charles Manson," Sarah Pender escapes prison sparking a nationwide manhunt.

name: 9-1-1: Nashville
description:
Action, Drama
A high-octane procedural about heroic first responders, as well as their family saga of power and glamour set in one of America's most diverse and dynamic cities.

name: Abbott Elementary
description:
Comedy
A workplace comedy following a group of dedicated, passionate teachers — and a slightly tone-deaf principal —as they navigate the Philadelphia public school system. Despite the odds stacked against them, they are determined to help their students succeed in life, and though these incredible public servants may be outnumbered and underfunded, they love what they do — even if they don’t love the school district’s less-than-stellar attitude toward educating children.

name: Tell Me Lies
description:
Drama
"Tell Me Lies" follows a tumultuous but intoxicating relationship.

name: The Secret Lives of Mormon Wives
description:
Reality
The scandalous world of a group of Mormon mom influencers implodes when they get caught in the midst of a swinging sex scandal that makes international headlines. Now, their sisterhood is shook to its core. Faith, friendship and reputations are all on the line. Will #MomTok be able to survive and continue to give the rulebook a run for its money, or will this group fall from grace?

Some flashing lights sequences or patterns may affect photosensitive viewers.

name: The Artful Dodger
description:
Adventure, Crime, Drama
Jack Dawkins is The Artful Dodger, now a surgeon torn between impossible love and his criminal past.

name: Phineas and Ferb
description:
Action, Animation
Phineas and Ferb have big summertime adventures with friends.

name: Wonder Man
description:
Action, Adventure, Comedy
Aspiring actor Simon Williams is struggling to get his career off the ground. During a chance meeting with veteran actor Trevor Slattery, Simon learns legendary director Von Kovak is remaking the superhero film "Wonder Man." These two actors at opposite ends of their careers pursue life-changing roles in this film as audiences get a peek behind the curtain of the entertainment industry.

name: Death in Paradise
description:
Crime, Drama, Mystery
The sun-soaked, smash-hit whodunnit returns for more murder mysteries with a light touch and a warm heart. DI Neville Parker and the team are back on the idyllic Caribbean island of Saint Marie with more ingenious murders to solve. In the 100th episode, Selwyn celebrates 50 years of police service and comes face to face with a surprising enemy.

name: Family Guy
description:
Animation, Comedy
The adventures of an eccentric family living in New England.

name: Percy Jackson and the Olympians
description:
Action, Adventure, Family
Percy Jackson sails to the Sea of Monsters to rescue his friend Grover and save Camp Half-Blood.

name: The Pitt
description:
Drama
The staff of Pittsburgh's Trauma Medical Center work around the clock to save lives in an overcrowded and underfunded emergency department.

name: Doc
description:
Drama
A doctor with memory loss must navigate an unfamiliar world.

name: DTF St. Louis
description:
Comedy
When weatherman Clark Forrest (Emmy® winner Jason Bateman) and his new on-air ASL interpreter Floyd Smernitch (Emmy® nominee David Harbour) strike up a friendship in the sleepy St. Louis suburb of Twyla, Missouri, they quickly discover that both of their marriages have stalled. After turning to a new app for extramarital affairs, their unlikely friendship is put to test when a love triangle forms...and one of them ends up dead. A comedic, twisted mystery from creator Steven Conrad, DTF St. Louis mines middle-aged malaise, long-held insecurities, and the bonds of friendship – as a pair of formidable investigators dig deeper to unravel the case.

name: Georgie & Mandy's First Marriage
description:
Comedy
Follows YOUNG SHELDON's Georgie (Montana Jordan) and Mandy (Emily Osment) as they raise their young family in Texas while navigating the challenges of adulthood, parenting, and marriage.

name: Rooster
description:
Comedy
A comedy set on a college campus centering on an author's (Steve Carell) complicated relationship with his daughter (Charly Clive).

name: Lord of the Flies
description: Drama, Thriller

name: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description:
Action, Adventure, Drama
Set a century before the events of Game of Thrones, this improbable tale centers on the heroic adventures of an unexpected duo - the naïve but courageous knight Ser Duncan the Tall and his diminutive squire Egg. As Dunk sets out to prove himself at the upcoming jousting tournament in Ashford, his chance meeting with the clever and mischievous Egg marks the beginning of their unlikely friendship.

name: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days
description:
Documentary, Reality
90 Day Fiance: Before the 90 Days features Americans who believe they've found their soul mate online and are traveling to a different country to meet them for the very first time. During the trip, the American will get to know a practical stranger, uncovering truths and secrets that they never expected.

name: Primal
description:
Action, Adventure, Animation
At the dawn of evolution, a caveman and a dinosaur on the brink of extinction bond over unfortunate tragedies and become each other's only hope of survival in a treacherous world.

name: First and Last
description:
Drama, Romance
Traveling in the pandemic has been challenging, but the waves remain in the same place and often close to home. Home Missions is about a passion for surfing that can overcome the biggest difficulties. surf

name: Like Water for Chocolate
description:
Drama, Romance
​Executive produced by Oscar® nominee Salma Hayek Pinault, this powerful adaptation of Laura Esquivel's acclaimed novel of the same name chronicles the complicated love story between Tita de la Garza (Azul Guaita) and Pedro Múzquiz (Andrés Baida). After falling in love as adolescents, Tita and Pedro have counted the moments until they could finally marry… until deeply entrenched family customs upend their plans. Inspired by lessons from their family cook Nacha, Tita turns to her greatest place of refuge: the kitchen. Infusing recipes from the heart and magical realism with the historical significance of the Mexican Revolution, the compelling drama series celebrates youth and desire while highlighting one woman's journey to control her own destiny.

name: Gold Rush
description:
Reality
In the face of an economic meltdown, a group of men will risk everything to strike it rich mining for gold in the wilds of Alaska.

name: 90 Day: The Single Life
description:
Reality
Now single, 90 Day Fiance favorites are looking to find love again while attempting to let go of baggage from their past.

name: Neighbors
description:
Documentary
This explosive series explores the chaotic and complicated disputes of neighbours...and the extreme lengths they'll go to defend what's theirs.

name: Industry
description:
Drama
This series follows a group of young graduates competing for a limited set of permanent positions at a top investment bank in London

name: The Loud House
description:
Action, Animation
As the only boy in a family with 10 sisters, 11-year-old Lincoln is in the middle of the chaos that resides in the Loud household.

name: Portobello
description:
Crime, Drama
In the early 1980s, Enzo Tortora (Fabrizio Gifuni) is one of the most beloved figures on Italian television: respected, trusted, and watched by millions each week on his long-running variety series "Portobello." But in the midst of Italy's war against organized crime, Enzo's life is upended when he's falsely connected to the notorious Camorra criminal ring. After his arrest, Enzo's case triggers a legal and media firestorm that shatters public trust, redefines his legacy, and forces him to clear his name from behind bars. From acclaimed writer/director Marco Bellocchio, Portobello tells the true story of a national icon brought down by the very system meant to protect him -- in one of the most infamous miscarriages of justice in Italian history.

name: Heated Rivalry
description:
Drama, Romance
Heated Rivalry tells the epic story of hockey’s steamiest secret - from a tangled, confusing connection to an undeniable, all-consuming bond - culminating in a powerful love story. Canada’s golden boy Shane Hollander (Hudson Williams) and Russia’s Ilya Rozanov (Connor Storrie) are two of Major League Hockey’s biggest stars and fierce rivals bound by ambition, glory, and a magnetic pull neither can fully understand. Drafted first and second in the same year, they’ve spent their careers chasing cups, Olympic gold, and scoring records, all while trying to outrun the pull between them. Behind the cameras and the wins lies a years-long entanglement that began as a secret fling between fresh-faced rivals. As they battle for dominance on the ice, they struggle to make sense of their feelings off it. Over eight years, their connection deepens into a complex journey of love, denial, and self-discovery. Torn between the sport that defines them and the love they can’t ignore, Shane and Ilya must decide if there’s room in their fiercely competitive world for something as fragile and as powerful as real love.

name: Madam Beja
description:
Drama
The story of a woman who turned her pain into the power of seduction and dared to challenge every convention of Imperial Brazil.

name: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
description:
Adventure, Animation
Welcome back to Elmore, where the laws of reality are a joke, and family life is anything but ordinary. Whether he's battling an evil fast-food empire, facing off against a sentient AI in love with his mom, or trying to stop Banana Joe from wearing pants, Gumball Watterson drags his brother Darwin, sister Anais, and the rest of the town of Elmore along for the ride.

name: The Curious Case of...
description:
Crime, Documentary
Take a deep dive into real-life scandals, exposing bizarre secrets, shattered lives and twisted motives. Led by Beth Karas, each gripping story uncovers deceit, greed, and manipulation. Proving truth is far more chilling than fiction.

name: Finding Your Roots
description:
Documentary, History
Renowned scholar Dr. Henry Louis Gates, Jr. returns for a new season of FINDING YOUR ROOTS. Using genealogical detective work and cutting-edge DNA analysis, Gates guides twenty-one influential guests deep into the branches of their family trees, revealing surprising stories of love, hardship, and triumph that transcend borders and merge to form an American root system fortified by its diversity.

name: Hijack
description:
Drama, Thriller
Idris Elba is a businessman whose flight is hijacked, leading him to try using his negotiating skills to save the day.

name: Golden Kamuy
description:
Action, Adventure, Animation
Sugimoto and Asirpa's new journey begins!! The new chapter to the survival race to get the gold stolen from the Ainu finally begins a new arc!! After the Immortal Sugimoto, AKA, Sugimoto Saichi, and the Ainu girl Asirpa reunited in the freezing land of Karafuto, Asirpa witnesses the death of Kiroranke and remembers the key to solving the mystery behind the missing gold. Sugimoto and Asi...

name: The Hunt
description: Drama, Thriller

name: Margo's Got Money Troubles
description: Comedy, Drama

name: Imperfect Women
description: Drama, Mystery, Thriller

name: Born to Be Wild
description:
Documentary
From first steps to first hunts, follow six rare baby animals as they learn survival skills and bring hope for the future of their species in the wild.

name: The Sisters Grimm
description:
Animation, Family, Fantasy
One year after their parents’ mysterious disappearance, sisters Sabrina and Daphne move to a magical town where fairytales are real and secrets lurk behind every corner.

name: Knife Edge: Chasing Michelin Stars
description:
Documentary
Experience thrilling highs and crushing lows as the world’s best chefs pursue the ultimate accolade: a Michelin Star. These anonymous inspectors have never let anyone in on their mysterious ways, until now.

name: Mr. Scorsese
description:
Documentary
Explore the many lives of Martin Scorsese through intimate interviews with the man himself, access to his private archives, plus conversations with Robert De Niro, Leonardo DiCaprio, Margot Robbie, Daniel Day-Lewis, Steven Spielberg, and more.

name: Pluribus
description:
Drama, Science Fiction
The most miserable person on Earth must save the world from happiness.

name: KPOPPED
description: Global music icons team up with world-renowned K-pop idols for spectacular song battles.

name: Down Cemetery Road
description:
Thriller
From the executive producers of Slow Horses. When a house mysteriously explodes in the British suburbs, a concerned neighbor teams up with a private investigator to find the truth—landing them in the middle of a chilling government conspiracy.

name: The Last Frontier
description:
Action, Drama, Thriller
When a prison transport plane crashes in the remote Alaskan wilderness, the region's lone marshal must protect the town he's vowed to keep safe.

name: Andhar Maya
description: Horror, Mystery

name: Smoke
description:
Crime, Drama, Mystery
When an arson investigator begrudgingly teams up with a police detective, their race to stop two arsonists ignites a twisted game of secrets and suspicions.

name: Self-Portrait as a Coffee Pot
description:
Documentary
Step inside the roving creative imagination of William Kentridge with this exclusive nine-part series. An ode to procrastination, pacing, and messy desks, this playful first episode sees the South African artist invoke a doppelgänger with whom to squabble over the intangible seeds of inspiration.

name: Green Porno
description:
Comedy, Documentary
Anchovy orgies, sadomasochistic snails, and hermaphrodite worms -- Isabella Rossellini reveals the wacky, kinky, confounding mating rituals of insects and marine life in this blissfully bonkers, utterly singular short-film series. With brightly colored costumes and paper puppets, Rossellini acts out a panoply of reproductive oddities: the praying mantis that consumes its partner while copulating, the male bee who loses his penis in the act, and the shrimp that shimmies seductively out of its shell before getting it on. Part nature documentary, part DIY cartoon, Green Porno is a cheekily hilarious, gonzo zoology lesson propelled by Rossellini's irrepressible charisma.

name: Teenage Boss: Next Level
description:
Documentary
The real-world influence of gaming: from its impact on technology and entertainment to politics and culture at large.

name: Audio-Files
description:
Documentary, Music
Where are the remains of Alexander the Great, Cleopatra and Caesar? Missing bodies and mysterious deaths challenge the historical record.
